---
title: "animated_figure_drafts"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(gganimate)
library(rgl)
library(rayshader)
library(rlang)
library(plotly)
```

```{r}
coral <- read_csv(here::here("..", "eds-coral-data-storage-management", "data", "volume_corals.csv"), na = c("UK", "Na", "?", "MK", "Remove, off transect in P9", "Unsampled", "unsampled", "NA", "US", "NS", "MissingObs", "HA", "Dead", "D", "dead", "v", "G")) %>% 
  mutate(y_scaled = y / 100,
         z_scaled = z / 100)
```
```{r}
coral_colors <- c(
    Acr = "blue", 
    Poc = "red", 
    Por = "darkgreen", 
    Mil = "darkorange"
  )


sph_vol <- function(l, w, h){
  v = ((l + w)/2)/2**3 * (4/3) * h
return(v)
}

cyl_vol <- function(l, w, h){
  v = (((l + w)/2)/2)**2 * 3.14 * h
return(v)
}

# Calculate volume of pocillopera:
coral_volume_poc <- coral %>% 
  filter(site == "LTER1",
         taxa == "Poc") %>% 
  rowwise() %>% 
  mutate(volume = sph_vol(length, width, height)) %>% 
  ungroup()

coral_volume <- coral %>% 
  filter(site == "LTER1",
         taxa != "Poc") %>% 
  rowwise() %>% 
  mutate(volume = cyl_vol(length, width, height)) %>% 
  ungroup()

coral_volume_mod <- rbind(coral_volume_poc, coral_volume)



```

```{r}
plot_3d <- function(site_name, habitat_type, transect_number)
  
  {symbol_map <- c( # Assign shapes to coral genera
  "Acr" = "diamond",
  "Poc" = "circle",
  "Por" = "square",
  "Mil" = "cross"
)
  
# define color for each taxa (optional but helps distinguish)
coral_colors <- c(
    Acr = "blue", 
    Poc = "red", 
    Por = "darkgreen", 
    Mil = "darkorange"
  )

coral_volume_mod$symbol <- symbol_map[coral_volume_mod$taxa]


vol <- coral_volume_mod %>% 
  filter(site == site_name &
    habitat == habitat_type &
           transect == transect_number) %>% 
  mutate(volume_scaled = volume / 10)

plot_ly(vol, 
        x = ~y_scaled, 
        y = ~x, 
        z = ~z_scaled,
        frame = ~year,          # add this
        type = "scatter3d", 
        mode = "markers",
        color = ~taxa,
        colors = coral_colors,
        symbol = ~taxa,
        symbols = symbol_map,
        marker = list(
          size = ~volume_scaled,
          sizemode = "area"
        ),
        text = ~paste("Taxa:", taxa, "<br>Volume:", volume),
        hoverinfo = "text") %>%
  layout(
    width = 900,
    height = 500, 
    scene = list(
      xaxis = list(title = "y_scaled"),
      yaxis = list(title = "x"),
      zaxis = list(title = "z_scaled"), 
      aspectmode = "manual",
      aspectratio = list(x = 1, y = 5, z = 1)
    )) %>%
  animation_opts(
    frame = 1500,
    transition = 0,   # set to 0 for 3d - transitions can cause issues
    redraw = TRUE     # important for 3d plots
  ) %>%
    animation_slider(
      currentvalue = list(prefix = "Year: ")
    )}


plot_3d("LTER1", "OR", "T01")
```
```{r}
vol <- coral_volume_mod %>% 
  mutate(volume_scaled = volume / 100)

vol %>% 
  filter(site == "LTER1", habitat == "BR") %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x,y_scaled, group = coral_number)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = taxa, size = volume_scaled), show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = coral_colors) +
  facet_grid(taxa~transect) +
  theme(aspect.ratio = 0.2) +
  transition_states(year,
    transition_length = 2,
    state_length = 1) +
  labs(title = 'Year: {closest_state}')
```
